name: Aditya Kumar
summary: Aditya shares how he overcame his fear of public speaking and cracked the PPDT to get recommended for the Army wing.
data: Getting recommended from 11 SSB Allahabad was a dream come true. In my previous two attempts, I got screened out on Day 1. I realized my mistake was a lack of clarity in PPDT narration. For my third attempt, I practiced describing random pictures, keeping my voice steady, and focusing on a positive storyline. During the Group Discussion, instead of shouting, I listened to others and gave 2-3 logical points. This helped me get screened in. The GTO tasks went smoothly because I focused on group cooperation rather than individual dominance. In the final conference, I was calm, and my recommendation was announced. Have faith in your preparation!
